entry.title: Hostess Brings Back Maple Glazed Donettes and More for Fall 2025
entry.summary:
Hostess has brought back a trio of seasonal treats for fall 2025, including Maple Glazed Donettes and Pumpkin Spice Twinkies.
Maple Glazed Donettes are mini cake donuts covered in a maple-flavored glaze. You can find them now in stores nationwide in a 9.5-oz bag. Prices vary, but they cost $2.50 to $3 near me in Los Angeles. Pumpkin Spice Twinkies come in a 10.86-oz box of eight individually-wrapped snack cakes. They feature the brand's classic golden sponge cake with a pumpkin spice-flavored creme. A box ranges from $3.50 to $5 near me. Also back this year are Iced Pumpkin Cupcakes. They consist of pumpkin cupcakes with creme filling, topped with white icing and an orange icing squiggle. They're available in a 2-count single-serve pack and an 11.57-oz box of eight cupcakes. Like the Twinkies, the price of a box ranges from $3.50 to $5 near me. Photo via Hostess. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New Smoky Chipotle Rub Arrives at Wingstop
entry.summary:
Wingstop welcomes new Smoky Chipotle Rub as the latest limited-time flavor for the fast-food chain's various fried chicken options.
According to Wingstop, the new flavor takes its cues from the "classic smoky BBQ taste with a kick of fire-roasted peppers" and also includes a touch of honey and paprika. In terms of spiciness, it rates three "flames" out of five on Wingstop's heat scale. Smoky Chipotle Rub is available now for a limited time at participating Wingstop locations nationwide. It can be ordered as a flavor on the chain's traditional wings, boneless wings, crispy strips, and chicken sandwiches. Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte and Pumpkin & Cream Pie Return to McDonald's
entry.summary:
The Pumpkin Spice Latte and Pumpkin & Creme Pie are back at McDonald's for fall 2025.
The McCafe Pumpkin Spice Latte features espresso and milk mixed with pumpkin spice-flavored syrup. It's available hot or iced. McDonald's Pumpkin & Creme Pie features a baked turnover-style crust with a sugar coating filled with pumpkin pie on one side and creme on the other. Prices vary by location, but a medium Pumpkin Spice Latte is $3.29 near me in Los Angeles, while a Pumpkin & Creme Pie is $2.19 for one or two for $3.79. Both seasonal items are available at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide for a limited time. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:
The Caramel Apple Empanada is now back at Taco Bell with exclusive early access for its rewards members ahead of a national launch as part of the Decades Y2K Menu on September 9, 2025.
A nod to the 2000s, the Decade Y2K Menu features the limited-time return of several menu items from that time, including the Caramel Apple Empanada, Cool Ranch Doritos Locos Tacos, 7-Layer Burrito, Double Decker Taco, and Chili Cheese Burrito (which is actually always available in select markets). entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito features grilled marinated steak, shredded lettuce, Avocado Ranch Sauce, pico de gallo, crunchy fiesta strips, shredded cheddar cheese, and Creamy Chipotle Sauce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla and grilled.
I got one for $3.29 (most areas have them for $3, though). I don't typically like lettuce in a burrito as it tends to wilt in short order when sealed in a flour tortilla. However, the only hot/warm ingredient in the Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito is the steak, which wasn't exactly plentiful, so the lettuce managed to keep a decent amount of texture. The watery crunch of the lettuce was buoyed by the heartier crunch of the fiesta strips, while the pico de gallo added acidity and flavor. The grilling of the tortilla added a extra layer of toasty flavor but not as much texture as you'd think. Two sauces was a bit excessiveand both sauces were mayo based so there was some overlap. The cheese added an extra richenss and a mild flavor.
The steak was tender, moist, and lightly seasoned but there was just barely enough to catch a bit of meatiness in most bites. Still, Taco Bell's Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito is one of two fast-food menu items that gets you some steak for $3 right now (the other is Taco Bell's Cheesy Melty Grilled Steak Burrito) and between the two, I enjoyed this one more as the lighter ingredients let the steak shine a little more. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chipotle Ranch Grilled Steak Burrito Calories - 520 Fat - 30g (Saturated Fat - 7g) Sodium - 990mg Carbs - 48g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 16g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pumpkin Pecan Pancakes are Back at Denny's
entry.summary:
Pumpkin Pecan Pancakes have made a limited-time return to Denny's for fall 2025. This year's fall menu also includes the new Bourbon Bacon Sirloin Dinner and Chocolate Cinnamon Milkshake.
Here's what you can expect from Denny's 2025 fall menu - Pumpkin Pecan Pancake Slam (pictured) - Two buttermilk pancakes made with pumpkin pie filling and glazed pecans and topped with a pecan pie sauce, served with two eggs made to order, hash browns, and two applewood-smoked bacon strips or sausage links. You can also purchase the pancakes a la carte. - New Bourbon Bacon Sirloin Dinner - A USDA choice cut, 8-oz seasoned sirloin steak topped with bourbon sauce, caramelized onions, chopped applewood-smoked bacon, and sauteed mushrooms. The dish is served with two sides and dinner bread. - New Chocolate Cinnamon Milkshake - Premium vanilla ice cream blended with chocolate syrup and cinnamon crunch. Photo via Denny's. entry.title: Del Taco's El Big Boxes Now with Bigger Burritos
entry.summary:
Del Taco has upgraded its El Big Boxes with bigger burritos that each weigh over half a pound. The fast-food chain also brings back the Orange Cream Shake and Funnel Cake Fries for a limited time.
The El Big Box changes come as the chain increases the size of some of its burritos to over half a pound, including: - ½ lb. Combo Beef & Bean Burrito - Seasoned beef, slow-cooked beans, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. - ½ lb. Beef & Cheddar Burrito - Seasoned beef, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. - ½ lb. Grilled Chicken Burrito - Grilled marinated chicken, house-grated cheddar cheese, shredded lettuce, secret sauce, and diced tomatoes, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. - ½ lb. 8 Layer Veggie Burrito - Slow-cooked beans made from scratch, cilantro lime rice, house-made guacamole, house-grated cheddar cheese, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, zesty red sauce, and sour cream, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. - ½ lb. Bean & Cheese Burrito - Made from scratch, slow-cooked beans, house-grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red or tangy green sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. The El Big Boxes are the same as before, only with a bigger burrito. The options include: - $5 Clásico - A Combo Beef & Bean Burrito, a Mini Quesadilla, Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a 16-oz drink. - $7 Mex Faves - A Combo Beef & Bean Burrito, a Grilled Chicken Taco, a soft Snack Taco, a Mini Quesadilla, and a 16-oz drink. - $9 Ameri-Mex (pictured) - A Double Del Cheeseburger, a Bean & Cheese Burrito (with a choice of red or green sauce), a soft Snack Taco, Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a 16-oz drink. The Orange Cream Shake is a vanilla shake blended with Fanta Orange, while the Funnel Cake Fries are deep-fried funnel cake batter shaped into a fry and covered in powdered sugar. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Pizza Hut - Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz
entry.summary:
Pizza Hut's Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz is a "hand-crafted" personal pizza topped with crispy-fried boneless chicken pieces, spicy Nashville Hot seasoning, fresh onions, mozzarella, and pickle ranch sauce.
The pizza costs $5 before 5PM and $6.99 after at my local Pizza Hut.
Judging by the size and shape, I would guess the Crafted Fratzz is made by taking half the dough from a small hand-tossed pizza and stretching it out into a thin, oval shape that's about twice the size of the chain's personal pan pizza. It's cut into eight small pieces, and each piece can be eaten in one large bite or two to three normal bites.
The crust was thin and airy with a really nice crispiness at the surface and just a bit of chew to the soft crumb. It did not have the cracker-like feel of the chain's Thin 'N Crispy crust. There was a decent amount of cheese on top, and it had managed a bit of a cheese pull. The boneless chicken bites were covered in a fairly thin, crispy coating. They were similar in size to a large marble, and there was exactly one piece of chicken on each slice.
The Nashville Hot seasoning was tasty with a strong heat and just a touch of sweetness. The heat came on fast but didn't linger for very long. It was sprinkled all over the pizza. The pickle ranch (does not contain pickles but is flavored with pickle spices, flavors, and herbs) balanced it out nicely with a creamy tang and a hint of herbs. The onions were sweet with a watery crunch.
Overall, Pizza Hut's Nashville Hot Chicken Crafted Flatzz was really nice, with a good mix of heat, sweetness, creamy richness, and acidity to go with a crispy crust. The price is affordable as well. I'm not a fan of the name, though, which I guess is a portmanteau of "flat" and "pizza." Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pringles Rolls Out New Smoky Lineup and Mingles Flavors
entry.summary:
Heading into fall 2025, Pringles welcomes a new Smoky lineup along with new Pringles Mingles flavors.
The new Pringles Smokey lineup includes: - New Pringles Smoky Bacon - Featuring notes of hickory smoke and pork for a "savory wood-fired smoky bacon taste." - New Pringles Smoky Mesquite BBQ - Featuring a tangy barbecue sweetness that delivers a "familiar barbeque flavor with a smoked twist." - New Pringles Smoky Cheddar - Offering a "mild, sweet applewood smokiness" paired with a "bold and creamy" cheddar cheese flavor. - New Pringles Sharp White Cheddar - A combination of "rich and slightly nutty flavors with a touch of acidity" that captures the flavor of aged white cheddar cheese. Pringles Mingles, the brand's line of puffed snacks, gets two new additions: - New Pringles Mingles Cinnamon & Sugar - The brand's first sweet flavor since 2016 offers " warm notes of cinnamon complemented by sugary sweetness." It comes in special limited-edition holiday packaging. - New Pringles Mingles Jalapeno & Queso - A pairing of a "creamy queso cheese taste" with "a fresh jalapeno flavor." Pringles' new Smoky lineup and new Pringles Mingles flavors arrive on store shelves nationwide starting this month. Photo via Pringles. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Extra Value Meals are Back at McDonald's Starting September 8, 2025
entry.summary:
Extra Value Meals are back at McDonald's restaurants nationwide starting September 8, 2025. The discounted combo meals include options for all dayparts with eight regular offerings and two limited-time specials: the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Extra Value Meal and the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal.
The $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg meal includes a Sausage McMuffin, hash browns, and a small coffee, while the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal includes a Big Mac, medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. The regular Extra Value Meals lineup offers a 15% discount versus buying the listed items with fries and a drink separately and includes the following entree options:
Sausage McMuffin with Egg Sausage Egg & Cheese McGriddles Egg McMuffin Bacon, Egg and Cheese Biscuit Big Mac 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Any variety Quarter Pounder burger (Original, Bacon, or Deluxe) Any variety McCrispy Sandwich (Original, Deluxe, or Spicy Deluxe)
McDonald's also reveals two new, limited-time Extra Value Meals to come in November: the $5 Sausage, Egg and Cheese McGriddles meal and the $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets meal. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Loaded Italian Sub Returns to Arby's
entry.summary:
The Loaded Italian Sub is making a limited-time return to Arby's and is described by the chain as "better than ever."
The Loaded Italian features thinly sliced ham, salami, and pepperoni served with Swiss cheese, banana peppers, lettuce, tomato, red onion, and garlic aioli on a toasted sub bun. Prices for the sandwich vary by location, but it costs $6.79 here in Los Angeles. Through September 28, 2025, Arby's Rewards members can redeem an offer for free large fries with the purchase of a Loaded Italian. Photo via Arby's. Nutritional Info - Arby's Loaded Italian Sub (281g) Calories - 600 Fat - 33g (Saturated Fat - 11g) Sodium - 2110mg Carbs - 46g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 29g Read more at Brand Eating!

Perhaps spurred by the new Oreo x Reese's collaboration, Crumbl debuts a new Oreo x Reese's Chocolate Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookie as part of this week's dessert menu running from September 1 through September 6, 2025.
Here's what you can expect to find at Crumbl this week: - Chocolate Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookie featuring Oreo x Reese's (pictured) - Two chilled cookies made with Oreo cookie pieces sandwiching a layer of creamy peanut butter filling mixed with Oreo cookie pieces and chopped Reese's Peanut Butter Cups. - Chocolate Covered Strawberry Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookies & cream cookie topped with fresh strawberry cream cheese frosting and a drizzle of semi-sweet chocolate. - Caramel Pumpkin Cake Cookie - A warm pumpkin cookie topped with caramel cream cheese frosting and a sprinkle of pumpkin cookie crumbs. - Sugar Cookie featuring Mother's Circus Animal - A warm sugar cookie embedded with rainbow sprinkles, topped with a layer of melty white drops, more rainbow sprinkles, and a Mother's Original Circus Animal Cookie. - Biscoff Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled brown sugar cookie topped with a buttercream made with Biscoff cookie butter and cookie crumbs. - Kentucky Butter Cake Cookie - A warm yellow butter cake cookie topped with a buttery glaze and a dusting of powdered sugar. - Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. entry.title: Pizza Hut Adds New Crispy Chicken Pizzas
entry.summary:
Alongside its Crafted Flatzz, Pizza Hut has introduced two new Crispy Chicken Pizzas to the menu for a limited time: the Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza and the Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza.
Both pizzas feature new Crispy Chicken and come with a dipping cup of new Pickle Ranch or Ultimate Ranch. Pickle Ranch is a ranch sauce flavored with pickle spices, flavors, and herbs (it does not contain pickles), while Ultimate Ranch is a tangy buttermilk ranch sauce. The Nashville Hot Chicken Pizza features a base of Pickle Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, onions, Nashville Hot seasoning, and a drizzle of Pickle Ranch. The Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza features a base of Ultimate Ranch and pizza cheese, topped with crispy chicken, bacon, and a drizzle of Ultimate Ranch. Both pizzas are available now at participating locations nationwide for a limited time through November 9, 2025. According to the fine print, the Crispy Chicken Pizzas are not available on Pan crust. You can get it on Tavern, Thin 'N Crispy, and Hand Tossed crusts. Prices vary, but a medium Crispy Chicken Pizza costs $16.99 near me in Los Angeles (a large is $2 more). Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wienerschnitzel Welcomes New $2, $4, and $8 Value Meals
entry.summary:
Starting September 1, 2025, Wienerschnitzel launches a new promotion called "All-American Deals," offering three discounted combo meals priced from $4 to $8.
The All-American Deals include: - 2 corn dogs and a small order of fries for $4 - 2 chili cheese dogs and chili cheese fries for $6 -2 corn dogs, 2 chili dogs, and chili cheese fries for $8 Wienerschnitzel's All-American Deals are a limited-time promotion at participating locations chain-wide. Photo via Wienerschnitzel. Read more at Brand Eating!
